result.stdout:
OpenApiTests - Contract testing tool for OpenAPI specifications

Usage:
  openapi-tests [options]

Options:
  --generate, -g              Generate HTTP file from OpenAPI specification
  --api-url <url>             API base URL (default: http://localhost:5225)
  --openapi-path <path>       Path to OpenAPI spec (default: /openapi/v1.json)
  --http-file <path>          Path to HTTP file (default: TestFiles/endpoints.http)
  --output <path>             Output path for reports (default: Reports)
  --help, -h                  Show this help message

Examples:
  openapi-tests --generate --api-url http://localhost:5000
  openapi-tests --generate --api-url https://api.com --openapi-path /swagger/v1/swagger.json
  openapi-tests --api-url http://localhost:5000 --http-file tests/api.http
  openapi-tests

commands.payload:
OpenApiTests - Contract testing tool for OpenAPI specifications

Usage:
  openapi-tests [options]

Options:
  --generate, -g              Generate HTTP file from OpenAPI specification
  --api-url <url>             API base URL (default: http://localhost:5225)
  --openapi-path <path>       Path to OpenAPI spec (default: /openapi/v1.json)
  --http-file <path>          Path to HTTP file (default: TestFiles/endpoints.http)
  --output <path>             Output path for reports (default: Reports)
  --help, -h                  Show this help message

Examples:
  openapi-tests --generate --api-url http://localhost:5000
  openapi-tests --generate --api-url https://api.com --openapi-path /swagger/v1/swagger.json
  openapi-tests --api-url http://localhost:5000 --http-file tests/api.http
  openapi-tests
